_doc: Policy for the self-running audit-loop workflow (.claude/workflows/audit-loop.mjs). Edit freely; the workflow reads this fresh each round.
_severity_note: critical/high + anything the triage flags ambiguous are REPORT-ONLY (never auto-pushed). Only low/medium mechanical fixes are applied, and only if the FULL suite stays green (no NEW failures vs baseline).
scoped_test_hint: For a scoped check, run only the test file(s) touched by the fix, e.g. `cd agent && ../.venv-test/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_X.py -q`. Run the FULL test_cmd only once, at the end, before pushing.
known_artifact_note: These fail only because the operator's live runtime_config.json enables litellm/meilisearch/discord etc. They pass in CI/clean-config and in isolation. The baseline is computed dynamically each round anyway; this list is documentation.
notes: Standing constraints honored by the integrator: work on master directly, never commit protected_paths, keep per-aspect sigils, end commit messages with commit_trailer. Fixers are read-only except the single sequential integrator.
